title: Sweet & Flaky Indian Peppers Crumble
description: A savory and sweet vegetarian dish perfect for those with a taste for spices and peppers, ideal as an afternoon snack or meal.
instructions: Dice the sweet peppers into small pieces.
In a large bowl, mix together diced peppers and all-purpose flour. Add vegetable oil, turmeric powder, garam masala, salt, and herbs if using.
Shape the mixture into thin crumbles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Stir occasionally to ensure even browning.
Let cool slightly before serving as a snack or lightly drizzle with honey for an extra touch of sweetness.
